parameters.query: SELECT i.id, i.user_id, i.indicator_type, i.company_name, i.company_id, i.source_url, i.source_platform, i.raw_snippet FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.meta->>'status' = 'pending_classification' ORDER BY i.created_at ASC LIMIT 50;

UPDATE winloss.indicators SET indicator_type = '{{ $json.indicator_type }}', reason = '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', sentiment_score = {{ $json.sentiment_score }}, meta = jsonb_set(COALESCE(meta, '{}'::jsonb), '{status}', '"classified"'::jsonb) WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid;
